title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Machine Learning and Data Preprocessing : Machine
Learning- Definition and Scope-Types of Learning- Data Preprocessing-Data
Cleaning-Handling Missing Data, Outlier Detection, and Treatment-Data
Transformation: Normalization and Standardization-Feature Engineering:
Feature Selection and Extraction
Techniques-Encoding
Categorical
Variables: One-hot Encoding and Label Encoding

title: Module 2
content:
Supervised Learning Techniques:- Regression Analysis-Simple Linear
Regression-Multiple
Linear
Regression-
Prevent
Overfitting:
Regularization- Classification Methods-Decision Trees: Construction,
Impurity Measures (Gini Index, Entropy), Pruning -Support Vector
Machines (SVM): Linear SVM, Kernel Trick, Non-linear SVM

title: Module 3
content:
Neural Networks and Deep Learning:– Introduction to Neural Networks
-Perceptron: Model and Limitations -Multilayer Feedforward Networks:
Architecture and Flow of Information-Activation Functions-Training Neural
Networks-Backpropagation Algorithm: Derivation and Implementation-
Gradient Descent Optimization: Batch, Mini-batch, and Stochastic-
Techniques for Improving Convergence: Learning Rate Schedules,
Momentum
Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN)-Basic Architecture: Convolutional
Layers, Pooling Layers, and Fully Connected Layers

title: Module 4
content:
Unsupervised Learning:- Clustering: K-means, Hierarchical, DBSCAN
Dimensionality Reduction: PCA, t-SNE.
Model Evaluation, Validation, and Optimization- Performance Metrics:
Confusion Matrix, Precision, Recall, F1-score, ROC, AUC, MAE, MSE,
R-squared.-Validation Techniques: k-fold, Stratified, Leave-one-out-
Hyperparameter
Tuning: Grid Search, Random Search-Ensemble
Methods: Bagging, Boosting (AdaBoost, Gradient Boosting, XGBoost)
Suggestion on Project Topics:
1. Customer Segmentation for Marketing
2. Anomaly Detection in Network Traffic
3.  Speech Emotion Recognition
4. Traffic Sign Recognition
5. Breast Cancer Prediction
